title: asclepias vexillata
intro: Asclepias vexillata, also known as the antelope horn milkweed, is a perennial plant in the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Asclepias vexillata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Asclepias vexillata can be made into a tea, tincture, or salve, with the roots and leaves often being used for medicinal purposes.
